title: Who knows the full story
wikitext:
[]: Who knows the full story?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Sep 20, 2009 8:36 pm Which characters actually know the most about what's going on in the series: what happened in 2I, the true nature of the Evas, and why the Angels are attacking? Gendo and SEELE are the obvious choices, but who else knows about everything?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Sep 20, 2009 8:37 pm Well, Fuyu. Ritsuko I think does too. But I think that's about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 20, 2009 8:38 pm Besides Gendo and SEELE... I'd say Kaji and/or Fuyutsuki. Maybe Ritsuko to.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sun Sep 20, 2009 10:17 pm PenPen

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Sun Sep 20, 2009 10:18 pm i would say PenPen. No one would suspect a thing... in all seriousness Fuyutski and Ritsuko. As for the pilots i think Rei knows quite a bit EDIT: damn you Teague! you beat me to it!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Sep 20, 2009 11:24 pm I don't think Kaji knows all that much, but he has an idea. I'd have to go with Ritsuko and Fuyutsuki, perhaps maybe even Naoko.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Sep 21, 2009 2:28 am By the End, Misato also seemed to be quite in the knows. And of course, eveybody is forgetting Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Sep 21, 2009 3:28 am Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 6:12 am I don't think Yui would know.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Mon Sep 21, 2009 6:30 am I don't think even Anno knew in the end. He might have, at one point, but SEELE wiped his memory

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Sep 21, 2009 6:37 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: I don't think Yui would know.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 6:53 am I don't think at the time Yui died she would know that there would be other angels. Inb4Unit-01

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:09 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: I don't think at the time Yui died she would know that there would be other angels. Inb4Unit-01

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:22 am Also she was connected to SEELE wasn't she? Wasn't that the (original) reason Gendo started dating her?

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Mon Sep 21, 2009 11:52 am Actually, I don't think anyone knows the whole story. Gendo knows probably pretty much the whole human side of things, as does Fuyutsuki. Yui definitely knew a lot. How much SEELE knew is subjective, they probably knew almost everything, but Gendo definitely kept some secrets from them. Kaji doesn't know everything, though since he's a triple agent, he might know more about both of them than either of them. But on the Angelic side of things, the person who knows the most is probably Kaworu Nagisa, who still didn't know that Lilith was being kept in the basement instead of Adam. Nobody knows the whole story. Except for maybe Hideaki Anno, but even he might not know what the Angels are trying to do.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 1:22 pm Alright, alright I was wrong. okay.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Sep 22, 2009 1:56 am Allemann wrote: Anno.

Gendo and SEELE are the obvious choices, but who else knows about everything?
